name: Non-record: LoRA TTT exploration on SOTA base (negative result)
blurb: Exploration of LoRA Test-Time Training (TTT) combined with SOTA (Int5-MLP + BigramHash + SWA, 1.1428 BPB). TTT adapts per-document during eval via rank-8 LoRA on Q/V projections. Negative result: TTT does not improve SOTA because seq_len=2048 + SmearGate/BigramHash already captures local context better than TTT's 256-token chunked adaptation. Tested on 1xH100 with multiple configurations (chunk sizes 128-512, seq_len 1024-2048). Full 8xH100 run pending.
author: hmlizama
